title: Crossfilter: Brush a Range to Filter (chart.link)

div.span: Drag a range on the histogram to filter the quarter chart

div.div: The top chart is a histogram of daily fluctuation %, binned by the link engine (bins: { count }) on a numeric x-axis. It has chart.selection.enabled, so brushing a range sets a [min, max] filter on the fluctuation dimension: the bottom chart re-aggregates to just the days in that range, and the histogram dims the bins outside it. Because a chart never filters itself, the histogram's own bars keep their full shape. Reset clears the brush.

chart.options: chart: { id: 'fluctuation', type: 'bar', height: 260, fontFamily: 'Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif', animations: { speed: 450 }, zoom: { enabled: false }, selection: { enabled: true }, toolbar: { autoSelected: 'selection', tools: { selection: true, zoom: false, pan: false, reset: false, download: false }, }, link: { id: 'market', dimension: function (r) { return r.pct }, bins: { count: 24 }, dimOpacity: 0.16, }, }, title: { text: 'Daily fluctuation % (brush a range here)', align: 'left' }, plotOptions: { bar: { columnWidth: '92%' } }, dataLabels: { enabled: false }, xaxis: { type: 'numeric', tickAmount: 8, labels: { formatter: function (v) { return Number(v).toFixed(1) + '%' } } }, colors: ['#6366f1'],

chart: { id: 'byQuarter', type: 'bar', height: 240, fontFamily: 'Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif', animations: { speed: 450 }, link: { id: 'market', dimension: function (r) { return r.q }, reduce: 'count', seriesName: 'Days', }, }, title: { text: 'Days by quarter (crossfiltered)', align: 'left' }, plotOptions: { bar: { columnWidth: '55%', borderRadius: 3, distributed: true } }, legend: { show: false }, dataLabels: { enabled: true }, colors: ['#6366f1', '#0ea5e9', '#22c55e', '#f59e0b'],
